sc.political.s: FEC records show IBM gave $1.2M to Democrats and $800K to Republicans in 2022 cycle (54/46 split).
sc.environment.s: No EPA enforcement actions or named pollution events documented; no third-party emissions certification found.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair labor practice findings or OSHA fatalities documented in public record.
sc.charity.s: No public record of named charitable programs with dollar amounts ≥1% of IBM revenue.
sc.animals.s: Not applicable; IBM is a technology services and software company.
sc.guns.s: IBM does not manufacture or retail firearms.
sc.privacy.s: No documented major FTC privacy enforcement actions or HIPAA breaches in public record.
sc.execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker ratio data not publicly disclosed in verified form.

charity.focus: Education, technology access, community development, employee volunteering
